name: generateCacheKey
description: 生成输入数据的哈希值作为缓存键

name: initCacheStore
description: 初始化缓存存储

name: getCacheStore
description: 获取缓存存储实例

name: initSessionStore
description: 初始化会话存储

name: getSessionStore
description: 获取会话存储实例

name: withCache
description:
带缓存的高阶函数包装器
包装一个异步函数，使其自动使用缓存

name: CacheStore
description: 缓存存储接口

name: SessionStore
description: 会话存储接口（基于 Hash 结构）

name: CacheOptions
description: 缓存配置选项

name: createDocumentUnderParent
description:
Create a new document under the given parent in the closure-table tree.
If `parentId` is null, the project root document is used as the parent.

name: createNotification
description: Create an in-app notification record and publish notification:created event.

name: markAllNotificationsRead
description: Mark all notifications as read.

name: markNotificationRead
description: Mark notification read.

name: upsertMessagePreference
description: Update user message preference (upsert).

name: grantFirstUserSuperadmin
description:
检查是否为首位注册用户：若是，自动授予 system#superadmin 权限元组，
并将 setting "system:first_user_registered" 置为 true。

性能优化：只查一次 setting（O(1)），不走 count(*)。
幂等：若 setting 已存在则直接返回。

name: grantPermissionTuple
description: 插入权限关系元组，已存在则忽略（幂等）。

name: insertAuditLogs
description: 批量插入鉴权审计日志。写入失败时静默忽略，不影响业务流程。

name: revokePermissionTuple
description: 删除权限关系元组。元组不存在时静默完成（幂等）。

name: seedSystemRoles
description:
幂等地确保 4 个系统角色存在于数据库中。
使用 INSERT ... ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING。

name: getCommentRecipient
description: Resolve the notification recipient for a comment: reply author or translation author. Returns null when same as commenter.

name: getProjectRootDocument
description:
Query the root document for a project — the document with no parent in the
closure table.

name: fetchTermsByConceptIds
description:
Fetch full term pair details for a list of concept IDs.

Unlike `listLexicalTermSuggestions`, this does not perform any matching —
it simply resolves the source + translation term texts and definition for
the given concept IDs. Pairs with no matching term in either language are
omitted.

name: buildConceptVectorizationText
description:
Build a structured text representation of a term concept for embedding
vectorization, following the genus–differentia definition method.

Output format:
```
Terms: creeper、苦力怕、爬行者
Subjects:
 - 敌对生物: 危险且具侵略性的生物…
Definition: 绿色的，会悄悄接近玩家并自爆的怪物。
```

Returns `null` if no meaningful content exists (no terms, no subjects, no
definition), indicating that this concept should not be vectorized.

name: LookedUpTerm
countUnread
description: Count unread notifications.

name: getEnabledChannels
description: Get enabled channels for a user's message category. Falls back to `["IN_APP"]`.

name: getNotification
description: Get a single notification by ID (restricted to the owner).

name: listNotifications
description: Query paginated notifications.

name: listPreferences
description: List all message preferences for a user.

name: loadUserSystemRoles
description:
加载用户的系统级角色（system object 上的权限元组）。
返回用户对 system:* 持有的所有 relation 列表。

name: getUserEmail
description: Get a user's email address by user ID.

name: OperationContext
description:
Cross-cutting context passed through operation chains.
Contains a trace ID for distributed tracing, an optional abort signal,
and an optional plugin manager instance override.

name: adaptMemoryOp
description:
Adapt a memory translation to fit the current source text via LLM.

Returns `{ adaptedTranslation: null }` when:
- No LLM_PROVIDER is available
- The LLM signals the texts are too different (`[SKIP]`)
- Any error occurs during the LLM call

name: addTermToConceptOp
description:
Add a term entry to an existing termConcept.

After the write completes, the domain event handler automatically
triggers concept re-vectorization (term list changes affect the vectorization text).

name: autoTranslateOp
description:
Auto-translate a translatable element.

Fetches machine-translation suggestions and memory matches in parallel,
then applies a priority rule to pick the best candidate and create a
translation record. Priority: memory > MT suggestion.
Returns `{}` when no candidate is available.

name: createElementOp
description:
Create translatable elements.

First creates TranslatableStrings (with vectorization), then inserts
the corresponding TranslatableElement rows.

name: createTermOp
description:
Create term entries.

Directly stores term text (text + languageId), then builds the
structured vectorization text for each termConcept and vectorizes it.

name: createTranslatableStringOp
description:
Create translatable strings.

First vectorizes the text data, then creates the TranslatableString
rows in the database.

name: createTranslationOp
description:
Create translation records.

1. Create translatable strings (with vectorization)
2. Insert translation records
3. Trigger optional publish notification via domain event
4. Optionally write to translation memory
5. Run QA checks for every created translation

name: deduplicateAndMatchOp
description:
Deduplicate term candidates and match against the existing glossary.

1. Normalize-deduplicate candidates by normalizedText (lemma) as the aggregation key
2. Batch-compare against the existing glossary via listLexicalTermSuggestions (pg_trgm word_similarity)
3. Mark candidates that already exist in the glossary

name: deleteTermOp
description:
Delete a term entry.

After deletion, the domain event handler automatically triggers
concept re-vectorization.

name: diffElementsOp
description:
Compare old and new elements and apply additions, deletions, and updates.

1. Fetch old elements
2. Match old and new elements by meta
3. Process text updates, sort-index updates, and position updates
4. Create newly added elements
5. Delete removed elements

name: fetchAdviseOp
description:
Fetch machine-translation suggestions.

Queries the TRANSLATION_ADVISOR plugin service for MT suggestions,
with optional glossary term injection, translation memory context,
and element metadata. Upstream callers can pass preloaded terms/memories
via `preloadedTerms` / `preloadedMemories` to skip internal DB queries.

name: llmRefineTranslationOp
description:
Post-edit a translation using an LLM.

Sends the candidate translation and glossary context to the LLM,
requiring it to use the given terms strictly, preserve the source meaning,
and maintain consistency with neighboring translations.
Returns the candidate unchanged when no LLM_PROVIDER is available.

name: llmTermAlignOp
description:
LLM term alignment (fallback strategy).

Uses the LLM to judge candidate pairs that vector-based and
statistical alignment could not resolve with high confidence.
Internally batches LLM calls (default 30 pairs per batch).

name: llmTermEnhanceOp
description:
Enhance term candidates using an LLM.

Validates low-confidence candidates via the LLM to determine whether
they are genuine terms, and batch-generates definitions and subjects.

- High-confidence candidates (>= confidenceThreshold) retain statistical
results; only definition/subject is generated.
- Low-confidence candidates require LLM validation before being kept.

name: loadElementTextsOp
description:
Batch load element texts.

Loads TranslatableElements and their TranslatableString.value in bulk
by documentIds or elementIds, returning a normalized list.

name: lookupTermsForElementOp
description:
Look up relevant terms for a translatable element from the backend.

Reuses the query chain from the glossary.findTerm route:
element → document → project → glossaryIds → lexical term query.
Uses ILIKE + word_similarity for term matching (no semantic search).

name: placeholderize
description:
Convert a flat token sequence into a placeholder template.

All token types except `text`, `unknown`, and whitespace-like types
are replaced with `{TYPE_N}` placeholders where N is a per-type counter.

name: fillTemplate
description:
Attempt to fill a translation template with values from a source mapping.

Given a translation template, translation slots from the stored memory,
and source slots from the current input text, replaces each placeholder
in the translation template with the corresponding value from the current
source text's slots (matched by placeholder name), falling back to the
stored translation's original value.

name: slotsToMapping
description: Convert PlaceholderSlots to a serializable mapping for DB storage.

name: mappingToSlots
SlotMappingEntry
description: JSON-serializable slot mapping for database storage.

name: insertMemory
description:
Write translations into the specified translation memory banks.

For each translation, generates source and translation templates via
tokenization and placeholderization (templates are only stored when
placeholders are present). Tokenization failures are non-fatal;
the memory item will be inserted without a template.

name: mergeAlignmentOp
description:
Merge multi-strategy alignment results.

1. Fuse vector, statistical, and LLM alignment pairs via weighted-average scores
2. Apply Union-Find transitive closure to form multilingual term groups
3. Conflict resolution: when multiple candidates exist for the same language,
keep the one with the highest connectivity

name: nlpBatchSegmentOp
description:
Batch NLP segmentation of texts.

Performs linguistic word segmentation in batch mode via the
NLP_WORD_SEGMENTER plugin service. When no plugin is available,
automatically falls back to the built-in Intl.Segmenter, processing
items one by one.

name: intlSegmenterFallback
description:
Built-in fallback segmentation based on Intl.Segmenter.

Called automatically when no NLP_WORD_SEGMENTER plugin is available.
Limitations: no POS tagging (pos set to "X" or "PUNCT"/"NUM"), no
lemmatization (lemma equals the lowercased text), and stop-word
coverage is limited to basic English vocabulary.

name: nlpSegmentOp
description:
Single-text NLP segmentation.

Performs linguistic word segmentation via the NLP_WORD_SEGMENTER
plugin service. When no plugin is available, automatically falls
back to the built-in Intl.Segmenter.

name: parseFileOp
description:
Parse file content into a list of translatable elements.

Parses the file via the FILE_IMPORTER plugin, then fills in the
sortIndex for each element.

name: qaTranslationOp
description:
Run the full QA pipeline for a specific translation.

1. Fetch the translation text, source text, and language information
2. Look up relevant terms (via backend query chain)
3. Tokenize source and translation texts in parallel (with term annotations)
4. Run QA checks
5. Persist QA results

name: qaOp
description:
Quality check.

Runs all registered QA_CHECKER plugin services against the source
text and translation text.

name: registerDomainEventHandlers
description:
Register domain event handlers (global singleton).

Subscribes to the following domain events:
- `concept:updated` → triggers concept re-vectorization
- `project:created` → grants owner permission to the creator
- `glossary:created` → grants owner permission to the creator
- `memory:created` → grants owner permission to the creator
- `comment:created` → notifies the translation author of new comment

Idempotent: repeated calls are no-ops.

name: retrieveEmbeddingsOp
description:
Retrieve embedding vectors for the given chunks.

Fetches vector representations for the specified chunk IDs from
the VECTOR_STORAGE plugin.

name: revectorizeConceptOp
description:
Re-vectorize the structured description text of a termConcept.

Builds the new vectorization text, compares it with the existing
`translatableString.value`, skips when unchanged (dedup), otherwise
vectorizes and updates `termConcept.stringId`.

name: revectorizeOp
description:
Re-vectorize existing chunks.

Updates the embedding vectors of existing chunks using a new
vectorizer. Intended for data migration when switching vectorization
models.

name: searchChunkOp
description:
Vector chunk search.

Supports two query modes:
1. Retrieve existing embeddings from the database by queryChunkIds
2. Pass raw vectors directly via queryVectors (skips DB lookup)

Then performs cosine-similarity search within the specified chunk ID range.

name: searchMemoryOp
description:
Search translation memory.

Searches for matching translation memory entries within the specified
memory banks via vector similarity. Supports two query modes:
lookups by chunkIds (pre-stored embeddings) or queryVectors (raw vectors).

name: semanticSearchTermsOp
description:
Semantic term search.

Vectorizes the query text on the fly and performs cosine-similarity
search against the vectorized termConcepts in the specified glossaries,
returning term pairs semantically related to the query.

Requires each target termConcept to have a vector index built via
{

name: statisticalTermAlignOp
description:
Statistical co-occurrence term alignment.

Exploits the natural translation-pair relationships in the CAT
system for co-occurrence comparison:
- Preferentially uses translation-pair relationships (translationId level)
- Falls back to element-level co-occurrence (elementId level) when
no translations exist

name: statisticalTermExtractOp
description:
Statistical term extraction.

Internally calls {

name: streamSearchMemoryOp
description:
Three-channel streaming memory search.

Returns an AsyncIterable that yields MemorySuggestion items as they
arrive from the three channels:
1. **Exact match** (fastest): SQL `value = input`, confidence = 1.0
2. **trgm similarity** (fast): `similarity() >= threshold`, confidence = similarity()
3. **Vector semantic** (slow): cosine similarity via vector storage

Results are globally deduplicated by `memoryItem.id`, keeping the
highest confidence. For non-exact results with stored templates,
attempts deterministic placeholder replacement to produce an
`adaptedTranslation`.

name: streamSearchTermsOp
termRecallOp
description:
Term recall.

Given a source text and glossary IDs, finds matching terms via ILIKE +
word_similarity, then enriches each match with its concept subject
information.

name: tokenizeOp
description:
Tokenize text.

Runs all registered TOKENIZER plugins in priority order.

name: triggerConceptRevectorize
description:
Resolve the current TEXT_VECTORIZER / VECTOR_STORAGE plugins and
trigger concept re-vectorization in a fire-and-forget manner when both
are available.

Silently skips when either plugin is unavailable (graceful degradation).

name: updateConceptOp
description:
Update the definition and/or M:N subject associations of a termConcept.

After the write completes, the domain event handler automatically
triggers concept re-vectorization.

name: upsertDocumentFromFileOp
description:
Update document elements from a file.

1. Parse the file to obtain an element list
2. Fetch the current (old) element IDs for the document
3. Diff the new and old elements and apply additions, deletions, and updates

name: vectorTermAlignOp
description:
Term alignment via vector cosine similarity.

1. Vectorize each candidate term (text + definition) and create a
formal TranslatableString
2. Perform pairwise cosine-similarity comparison across language groups
3. Record pairs with similarity >= minSimilarity into alignedPairs

name: vectorizeToChunkSetOp
description:
Vectorize texts and store as ChunkSets.

Uses the TEXT_VECTORIZER plugin to convert texts into embedding vectors,
creates ChunkSet/Chunk rows, and persists the vectors via the
VECTOR_STORAGE plugin.

name: zip
description:
输入任意个长度相同的数组 a, b, c...
输出由每个数组同一位置元素组成的数组的迭代器

name: assertPromise
summarize
description:
辅助函数：折叠大对象用于日志输出
- 数组显示为 Array(N)
- 对象显示为 {Object}
- 长字符串截断

name: ensureDB
description:
在应用启动前执行 \
用于维护数据库中的基本条目 \
不删除现有数据 \
所有修改都是试探性的
@returns

name: ensureRootUser
description:
确保根管理员存在
只有在第一次创建管理员时才为他分配根角色
也即允许根角色和其默认的密码账户被从根管理员处移除

name: registerAuditHandler
description:
注册 handler：批量写入 authAuditLog 表。
使用微批处理（收集 50 条或每 5 秒，一次 batch insert）。

name: createPermissionCache
description:
封装 CacheStore 的权限缓存辅助函数。
直接使用 createPermissionEngine 注入的 CacheStore（即 RedisCacheStore）。

name: isRelationImplied
description:
检查 requiredRelation 是否被 heldRelation 隐含（同一资源类型内）。
例如：持有 "owner" 即隐含 "editor" 和 "viewer"。

name: TransitiveRule
description:
跨资源传递性规则。
语义：如果 subject 对 parentObject 有 parentRelation，
      则隐含对 childObject 有 childRelation。
resolveParentId：给定 child object ID，查 DB 返回 parent object ID。

name: AscendRule
description:
"上溯"规则：element/translation 没有自己的权限元组，
鉴权时自动查找所属 document。

name: seedSystemRoles
description:
系统启动时调用（幂等）：确保 4 个系统角色存在。
使用 INSERT ... ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING。

name: grantFirstUserSuperadmin
description:
在 createAccount 注册流程后调用。
检查是否为首位用户：若是，自动授予 system#superadmin 权限元组，
并将 setting "system:first_user_registered" 设置为 true。

name: loadUserSystemRoles
description:
加载用户的系统角色列表（通过权限元组查询）。
返回用户对 system:* 持有的所有 relation 列表。

name: getPermissionEngine
description:
获取全局单例 PermissionEngine。
必须在调用前先通过 initPermissionEngine 初始化。

name: initPermissionEngine
description:
初始化全局 PermissionEngine 单例。
在应用启动时调用一次。

name: CompletedFactor
description: 完成的认证因子信息

name: AuthContext
description: 鉴权上下文，在各入口层创建后透传

name: ObjectRef
description: 引用某个具体对象

name: SubjectRef
description: 引用某个主体

name: WorkerStatus
description:
分布式扩展点

当前实现为单机版本：
- EventBus: InProcessEventBus
- Checkpointer: Memory/Postgres（后续）
- ExecutorPool: LocalExecutorPool
- Scheduler: Single process

name: EventPayloadMap
description: Maps each EventType to its inferred payload type.

name: TransformNodeExecutor
description:
Transform 节点执行器。

- 若 config.handler 存在 → 从 StepHandlerRegistry 分发执行
- 若 config.handler 不存在 → 保持原有 identity 行为（直接 completed）

name: defineTypedGraph
description:
声明一个类型安全的 DAG 工作流。

- 编译阶段：泛型推断保证节点 input/output schema 匹配
- 运行时：输出标准 GraphDefinition + 注册 step handler
- 执行时：增强的 TransformNodeExecutor 通过 config.handler 分发

name: defineNode
description:
辅助函数：显式声明一个类型安全节点，允许 TypeScript 正确推断 handler 参数类型。

用法：`defineNode({ input: schema, output: schema, handler: async (input) => {...} })`

name: runGraph
description:
Starts a typed graph as a new run and awaits completion.

Uses the global runtime (scheduler, eventBus, checkpointer) initialised by
`createDefaultGraphRuntime`. The `pluginManager` is sourced from the global
runtime unless overridden via `options.pluginManager`.

name: startGraph
description:
Starts a typed graph run and returns a handle containing the `runId`
and a `complete` promise.  Useful when the caller needs the `runId`
upfront (e.g. to filter graph-emitted events before the run finishes).

name: TypedNodeContext
description: Step handler 执行时注入的上下文

name: TypedNodeDef
description: 一个类型安全的节点声明

name: TypedGraphOptions
description: defineTypedGraph 的选项

name: TypedGraphDefinition
description: defineTypedGraph 的返回值

name: detectMobile
description:
尝试从 HTTP 请求头判断客户端是否为手机。
可在 SSR 环境中直接使用。

name: getServiceFromDBId
description: 不涉及插件函数调用，可以在事务中安全调用

name: resolvePluginComponentPath
description: 找到指定组件在本地插件目录中的位置

name: CatPlugin
description:
插件核心接口
所有的函数都应该是纯函数或副作用可控的工厂函数

name: PluginAuthContext
description:
插件鉴权上下文
用于在 capability 层做权限拦截

name: PluginContext
description:
插件运行时上下文
包含当前插件的配置、已注册的服务以及当前所处的作用域信息

name: AgentContextProvider
description:
Agent 上下文提供器插件服务接口。

每个 provider 声明：
1. 自己能提供哪些变量（provides）
2. 自己依赖哪些已有变量（dependencies）
3. 解析逻辑（resolve）

系统通过拓扑排序按顺序调用所有 provider 的 resolve，
将产出的变量累积到同一个 Map 中。

name: ContextResolveContext
description:
解析上下文，传递给 provider 的 resolve 方法。
包含当前已解析的变量 map 和数据库客户端以支持查询。

name: AgentToolProviderToolDef
description: A single tool definition provided by an AGENT_TOOL_PROVIDER plugin service.

name: AgentToolProvider
description:
Plugin service interface for providing custom agent tools.
Plugins implementing `AGENT_TOOL_PROVIDER` register additional tools
that the agent can use during execution.

name: AgentToolConfirmationPolicy
description:
Confirmation policy for agent tools. Controls whether the user
must approve execution before the tool runs.

name: AgentToolTarget
description:
Where the tool executes.
- `server` — Backend execution (default).
- `client` — Frontend (browser) execution via streaming protocol.

name: AuthFactorAAL
description:
Authentication Assurance Level:
- 1: single factor (e.g. password)
- 2: multi-factor (e.g. password + TOTP)

name: AuthFactorInput
description: Input provided by the user for this factor's challenge.

name: AuthFactorResult
description: Result of executing an auth factor.

name: AuthFactorExecutionContext
description: Context passed to an AUTH_FACTOR when it executes.

name: NlpSegmentContext
description: 分词请求上下文

name: NlpBatchSegmentContext
description: 批量分词请求上下文

name: CheckContext
description: QA 上下文

name: parseInner
challengeVerifierExecutor
description:
challenge_verifier — verify a user-provided challenge (TOTP code, OTP, etc.)
Delegates to the registered AUTH_FACTOR plugin for verification.
The factorId on the node definition selects which factor to use.

name: credentialCollectorExecutor
description:
credential_collector — collect identifier/username input from user.
Stores provided input into `nodeOutputs.<nodeId>` on the blackboard.

name: decisionRouterExecutor
description:
decision_router — a no-op executor node that simply lets the scheduler
evaluate outgoing edge conditions.
The `resolveNextNode` logic in the scheduler handles all routing.

name: identityResolverExecutor
description:
identity_resolver — look up user identity from the identifier stored on
the blackboard. Sets `identity` and `nodeOutputs.<nodeId>.userFound`.
Delegates to the database via `ctx.services.db`.

This executor is a structural placeholder. Actual DB lookup is wired in
the app layer when the scheduler is configured.

name: pluginCustomExecutor
description:
plugin_custom — delegate execution to a plugin-provided executor.
The `factorId` on the node definition selects which AUTH_FACTOR plugin to call.
If no plugin is registered for the factorId, returns a failed result.

name: sessionFinalizerExecutor
description:
session_finalizer — create a session for the authenticated user.
Marks the flow as completed and records the final AAL.

Actual session creation (cookie, session store write) is performed by
the app-layer executor override via `ctx.services.sessionStore`.

name: NotificationPushPayload
description: Notification push payload.

name: EmailProvider
description: Email provider interface implemented by plugins.

name: sendMessage
description: Send a message from anywhere in the backend by publishing message:send-requested.

name: ChannelDispatcher
description: Channel dispatcher interface.

name: MessageRequest
description: Message send request payload.

name: resolvePath
parseExpectedValue
description:
Parse a raw string value into a typed primitive (boolean, number, null, or string).

将原始字符串值解析为类型化的原始值（布尔值、数字、null 或字符串）。

name: evaluateCondition
description:
Evaluate a structured `EdgeCondition` against a blackboard data snapshot.

对黑板数据快照求值结构化的 `EdgeCondition`。

Supported operators:
- `eq` / `neq`: strict equality / inequality
- `exists` / `not_exists`: presence check (non-null/undefined)
- `in`: check whether the field value is included in the provided array
- `gt` / `lt`: numeric comparison (coerces field value to number)
